summary: A recent change touched only one file, Notes_For_Later.txt. The update appears to be a small tweak—no new text was added and nothing was deleted—so it’s likely just a correction, re‑ordering, or a metadata edit inside that note file. Because the modification is limited to this single text document, the rest of the program’s code and functionality were not affected. In short, the only thing that changed was a minor adjustment to the notes file, leaving the main codebase untouched.

The latest update added a large amount of new material to the presentation file that describes the Agentic AI components. The changes consist entirely of additional slides, expanding the document with fresh explanations and examples. No existing content was removed, so the original material remains unchanged. This work only touches the “Agentic AI Components.tex” file, leaving the rest of the codebase untouched.

Two recent updates added new content to the project’s documentation. First, a PDF slide deck titled “NETCOM_Agentic_AI_Overview_Final_Slides.pdf” was uploaded, providing a visual overview of the Agentic AI topic. Shortly after, the accompanying presenter script in the Word file “Agentic_AI_Presenter_Script.docx” was revised with additional wording and details. Together, these changes refresh both the visual and spoken materials used for presenting the Agentic AI overview.
